mappings.rationale: Music is integral to ballet and theatrical dance, relevant to the section's treatment of the integration of dance with other arts (section A.5) and ballet's relation to music.
Dance in the theatre is explicitly addressed in section A.5, and theatrical dance forms including musical theatre are relevant to the integration of dance with dramatic arts.
Dance in motion pictures is explicitly mentioned in section A.5, and the section discusses the relation of modern dance to motion pictures (section C.2).
Relevant to the section's treatment of the origins and functions of dance as art, and to primitive dance forms with ritualistic origins (section D).
Relevant to the section's treatment of primitive, folk, and popular dance (section D) and the cultural contexts of dance.
Folk music is closely tied to folk dance traditions, relevant to the section's treatment of primitive, folk, and popular dance (section D).
World music traditions are closely tied to dance across cultures, relevant to the section's treatment of dance history and primitive/folk dance.
Relevant to understanding the relationship between musical rhythm and dance movement, pertinent to choreography and the nature of dance as art.
Ethnomusicological study encompasses dance in non-Western cultures, relevant to the section's treatment of primitive, folk, and popular dance (section D).
Modern drama incorporates dance and movement, relevant to the section's discussion of modern dance's relation to drama (section C.2).
